name: canary-voice-tune
description: A high-performance VST3 audio plugin for MacOS M-Series to perform transparent voice pitch correction.

scripts.fetch-juce: mkdir -p vendor && if [ ! -d vendor/JUCE ]; then echo '>>> Downloading JUCE (develop)...' && curl -L https://github.com/juce-framework/JUCE/archive/refs/heads/develop.zip -o vendor/juce.zip && unzip -q vendor/juce.zip -d vendor && mv vendor/JUCE-develop vendor/JUCE && rm vendor/juce.zip && echo '>>> JUCE downloaded.'; else echo '>>> JUCE already present, skipping download.'; fi
scripts.build: pnpm run fetch-juce && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build . --config Release 2>&1

author: Dzmitry Sharko
